candidate_sources.provider: Sistema Nacional de Areas de Conservacion / MINAE
candidate_sources.production_gate: Record official layer/source, protected-area intersections, attribution, and allowed publication detail before shipping route packages.

candidate_sources.provider: Sistema Nacional de Informacion Territorial de Costa Rica
candidate_sources.production_gate: Record exact layer ids, dates, CRS, and terms before using derived GIS outputs.

target_use: field photos, footage, and audio reference
candidate_sources.production_gate: Use only item-level permissioned media or first-party captures; public social links remain reference-only until cleared.

review_questions: Which protected areas or conservation rules intersect the Pacuare planning corridor?
Are any access points, cultural sites, or sensitive habitats unsuitable for detailed publication?
What attribution and redistribution terms apply to official GIS layers?
Which guide/outfitter media can be used for texture, material, animation, or audio reference?
next_actions: Cross-check Pacuare planning bounds against SINAC/SNIT protected-area layers.
Create a guide/outfitter media permission matrix with creator, date, flow/weather context, and permitted use.
Keep public/social media references link-only until explicit rights are attached.
